revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23392883474|time triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Edit_templates%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} It shows a list of templates used to generate a link to edit a template or page or section. == Usage == {{Tlx|ed}} : {{ed|SomeTemplate}} gives {{ed|SomeTemplate}} : {{ed|edit templates|edit this link}} gives {{ed|SomeTemplate|edit this link}} {{Tlx|ed right}} : {{ed right|SomeTemplate}} gives {{ed right|SomeTemplate}} : {{ed right|SomeTemplate|this link}} gives {{ed right|SomeTemplate|this link}} {{Tlx|Edit}} : {{edit}} gives {{edit}} : {{edit|1=Rape|2=edit here|section=1}} gives {{edit|1=Rape|2=edit here|section=1}} : Parameters explained: :: {{edit :: {{para|1|Page to edit}} — Leave blank to edit current page. :: {{para|2|Text to display}} — Default: "edit" :: {{para|section|Section to edit}} — specific section to edit (e.g. 0 to edit the lead section only). Default: none (i.e. edit whole page) :: }} {{Tlx|edit section}} : {{edit section}} gives {{edit section}} {{Tlx|Navbar}} : {{navbar|{{PAGENAME}}}} gives {{navbar|{{PAGENAME}}}} : {{navbar|{{PAGENAME}}|mini=1}} gives {{navbar|{{PAGENAME}}|mini=1}} : {{navbar|{{PAGENAME}}|plain=1}} gives {{navbar|{{PAGENAME}}|plain=1}} : {{navbar|{{PAGENAME}}|fontstyle=color:green}} gives {{navbar|{{PAGENAME}}|fontstyle=color:green}} {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Documentation shared content templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} It shows a list of templates used to generate a link to edit a template or page or section. == Usage == {{Tlx|ed}} : {{ed|SomeTemplate}} gives {{ed|SomeTemplate}} : {{ed|edit templates|edit this link}} gives {{ed|SomeTemplate|edit this link}} {{Tlx|ed right}} : {{ed right|SomeTemplate}} gives {{ed right|SomeTemplate}} : {{ed right|SomeTemplate|this link}} gives {{ed right|SomeTemplate|this link}} {{Tlx|Edit}} : {{edit}} gives {{edit}} : {{edit|1=Rape|2=edit here|section=1}} gives {{edit|1=Rape|2=edit here|section=1}} : Parameters explained: :: {{edit :: {{para|1|Page to edit}} — Leave blank to edit current page. :: {{para|2|Text to display}} — Default: "edit" :: {{para|section|Section to edit}} — specific section to edit (e.g. 0 to edit the lead section only). Default: none (i.e. edit whole page) :: }} {{Tlx|edit section}} : {{edit section}} gives {{edit section}} {{Tlx|Navbar}} : {{navbar|{{PAGENAME}}}} gives {{navbar|{{PAGENAME}}}} : {{navbar|{{PAGENAME}}|mini=1}} gives {{navbar|{{PAGENAME}}|mini=1}} : {{navbar|{{PAGENAME}}|plain=1}} gives {{navbar|{{PAGENAME}}|plain=1}} : {{navbar|{{PAGENAME}}|fontstyle=color:green}} gives {{navbar|{{PAGENAME}}|fontstyle=color:green}} {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Documentation shared content templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
